units.content: Version history of Observable Universe model: v0.9-v0.95 included coupling maps, biology maps, marker passing, discovery, level learning
v0.96 renamed assemblyLevel to complexityLevel
v0.97 changed ComplexityLevel to numeric type (0|1|2|3|4|5) instead of string
v0.98 implements language-free core with integer ID dependencies from registry; names stored in supporting layer
Space class stores 6D coordinates: x, y, z position and px, py, pz momentum/prior position
Distance calculation method computes Euclidean distance between Space objects
CouplingEntry dataclass records bidirectional or directed relationships between entities with property values, measurement methods, and uncertainty

Universe class maintains 26+ attribute dictionaries tracking physical properties (mass, charge, frequency, acceleration, redshift), chemical bonding, biological markers (gene expression, protein abundance, phenotype, essentiality, clinical outcomes), and computational cost
couple() method records undirected couplings between two entities with symmetric key
measure() method records directed measurement from measurer to target with event logging
predict() method records computational predictions from pipeline to target with input list and event logging
create_photon() factory constructs light entity with position, direction, frequency, and velocity calculated from speed of light constant
create_massive() factory constructs particle entity with position, velocity, mass, optional charge, and prior position calculated from velocity and timestep
create_nucleon() factory constructs nucleon with strong coupling constant
create_neutron() factory constructs nucleon with weak decay parameters (mean lifetime, branching ratio)

create_computation() factory constructs entity with energy E, resistance R, temperature T; converts energy to mass via E=mc²; calculates maximum operations per second from energy divided by Planck constant
record_galaxy() factory records galactic observation with rotation curve data (luminous mass, outer radius, observed velocity, disk scale length)
record_redshift() factory records cosmological redshift observation
create_gene() factory creates gene entity associated with organism
create_drug() factory creates drug entity with mass
create_pathogen() factory creates pathogen entity
record_biopsy() records tissue or liquid biopsy result with mutation detection status and sample site
record_knockout() records gene knockout phenotype with severity score and organism
record_knockdown() records gene knockdown phenotype with severity score, organism, and knockdown method (default morpholino)
